letter.you-are-invited: With great honor, we invite you to our wedding, in the blessings of Allah ﷻ.
letter.invitation-title: We warmly invite you to join us at our wedding
letter.invitation-quote: You came into my life as an answer to my prayers...

closing-message.title: We look forward with gratitude to celebrating this special moment
closing-message.quote: Your presence in our lives is a blessing from Allah ﷻ. It would be our great joy and honor to have you join us in witnessing and praying for our special day. May this gathering become a means for His blessings, love, and mercy to descend upon us. Thank you for being part of our love journey in the pleasure of Allah.
closing-message.with-love: With love, in the pleasure of Allah ﷻ,

hero.scroll-to-explore: Scroll to explore our love story

couple.title: Meet the Happy Couple
couple.bride-description: The first daughter of Mr. Dindin & Mrs. Yuyun.
couple.groom-description: The first son of Mr. Hendar & Mrs. Sri Dewi.
couple.story-text: Our journey began through a ta’aruf process, inshaAllah blessed by Allah ﷻ, through the Marimenikah.or.id platform. From a simple introduction, Allah united our hearts and nurtured it into a bond filled with love and blessings. With gratitude, we are honored to share this special moment with all of you.
couple.love-quote: Allah created spouses from among yourselves so your hearts may find tranquility, and placed love and mercy between you—truly, these are among His signs.

details.title: Wedding Details
details.countdown-title: Counting Down to a Blessed Day, InshaAllah
details.countdown-subtitle: Every moment brings us closer to the day Allah has destined, filled with love and blessings
details.join-us-text: Join us as we exchange our sacred vows in the pleasure of Allah ﷻ and begin our blessed journey together
details.message: Save the date for our blessed day, and may Allah make it easy for you to attend.
details.join-us: Join us for our special day!

venue.title: Venue Information
venue.location-subtitle: Join us at these blessed venues as we celebrate our special day in the pleasure of Allah ﷻ
venue.shuttle-service: Complimentary shuttle service will be provided between the ceremony and reception venues.

gallery.journey-title: What kind of moment is this?
gallery.journey-subtitle: It’s okay, just a filler so it’s not empty

rsvp.presence-present: Your presence is the only present we need
rsvp.registry-text: If you wish to honor us with a gift, we've registered at:

music.browser-blocked: Browser blocked autoplay music. Please click the button below to enable wedding background music.
music.chrome-edge: Chrome/Edge: Click 🔒 icon in address bar → Sound → Allow
music.firefox: Firefox: Click 🔊 icon in address bar → Allow audio
music.safari: Safari: Settings → Websites → Auto-Play → Allow All Auto-Play
music.auto-note: Music will play automatically after you enable it
